text.tspan: Frames allocated once at create time — fixed memory footprint
SQLite PRAGMA cache_size controls pool_size at runtime
Dirty eviction: pwrite() before frame reuse
Clean eviction: direct reuse, no disk write

g.text: new page pwrite past EOF extends file

text.tspan: No lseek race — thread-safe by design

g.text: Hot L2 hit: ~10 ns pin_count++ only
Warm OS cache: ~1 µs kernel copy
